value.text: The Fridge — Cool, Fresh and Good

A student Christian radio station aiming to build faith, speak truth, and bring joy.

• 60 students on air during school days
• Broadcasts 24/7
• No ads

• Hamilton — 88.3FM
• Christchurch — 88.3FM
• Sumner — 88.3FM
• West Melton — 107.5FM
• Ashburton — 88.3FM
• Oamaru — 87.8FM
• Wanaka — 88.3FM
• Queenstown — 88.3FM
• Gore — 88.3FM
• Invercargill — 87.8FM

• Christchurch — 88.0FM
• Ashburton — 87.6FM
• Oamaru — 87.6FM
• Wanaka — 87.8FM
• Queenstown — 87.6FM
• Gore — 88.0FM
• Invercargill — 106.7FM

• Murray Robertson — 7am & 7pm daily
• The Healthy Breakfast — 7am–9am
• News — hourly (6am–8pm)
• The Chill Zone — 10pm–6am
• Bible teaching — 7am & 7pm

• Scripture, clean classics, and Christian music
• Built for faith, truth, and joy
• Student-led station with real broadcasting experience
• Encourages thoughtful, positive content

We follow Philippians 4:8:

Whatever is true, noble, right, pure, lovely, admirable, excellent, or praiseworthy — think on these things.

• Send shout-outs and song requests
• Submit recordings to go on air
• Host a transmitter at your school or church
• Live broadcast visits available in Canterbury
